message:
Command `WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== CTS log - beginning ==="
head -60 "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "^$" | head -40

echo ""
echo "=== CTS log - before crash ==="
grep -n "Clock\|TritonCTS\|clock\|Net\|clk\|CTS\|Sink\|Macro" "$WRAPPER_RUN/61-openroad-cts/openroad-cts.log" 2>/dev/null | grep -v "##" | tail -30` executed with exit code 0.
